name: 863 Program & NSFC Launch
shortDescription: Deng-approved State High-Tech R&D Program; NSFC founded one month earlier
impact: First sustained national funding for biotechnology; seeded BGI's HGP entry

name: 973 Basic Research Program
shortDescription: Mission-driven funding for strategic basic science
impact: Built academic capacity that returnees would later commercialize

name: Interim HGR Measures
shortDescription: First rules controlling foreign access to Chinese genetic samples
impact: Established the data-sovereignty principle later codified in 2019 and 2022

name: Major New Drug Creation Project
shortDescription: National translational R&D subsidy for indigenous drug development
impact: Funded the first wave of innovator platforms and clinical infrastructure

name: SFDA Director Executed
shortDescription: Zheng Xiaoyu executed for corruption; symbol of regulatory rot
impact: Exposed approval system as broken; set stage for later overhaul

name: Made in China 2025
shortDescription: Biopharma named one of ten priority manufacturing sectors
impact: Locked biotech into national industrial strategy; later weaponized by US trade policy

name: Order 117 / 722 Self-Inspection
shortDescription: Mass self-audit of clinical trial data
impact: ~80% of pending applications withdrawn due to fraud — brutal cleansing

name: Priority Review Pathway
shortDescription: Fast-track for innovative drugs and unmet need
impact: First substantive break from generics-first regime

name: Marketing Authorization Holder Pilot
shortDescription: Decoupled drug ownership from manufacturing
impact: Made it possible for asset-light biotechs to own approved drugs

name: China Joins ICH
shortDescription: Harmonized regulatory standards with US/EU/Japan
impact: Foreign trial data accepted; bridging trials enabled global pipelines

name: Conditional Approval Pathway
shortDescription: Early access for breakthrough therapies
impact: Years shaved off oncology and rare-disease approvals

name: NRDL Annual Negotiations Resume
shortDescription: National reimbursement list updates after 8-year freeze
impact: Created regular path to mass market — at the price of steep discounts

name: HKEX Chapter 18A
nameZh: 香港主板上市规则第十八A章
agency: Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited
documentRef: Main Board Listing Rules, Chapter 18A — Biotech Companies
shortDescription: Pre-revenue biotech listing pathway on the HKEX Main Board
impact: Solved the valley-of-death financing problem for pre-revenue Chinese biotech; by end-2023, 63 biotechs had listed under the regime, peaking at 20 IPOs in 2021.
keyProvisions: At least one Core Product past the concept stage with regulatory milestones met
Expected market capitalisation ≥ HK$1.5 billion at listing
≥125% working capital for the next 12 months
Meaningful pre-IPO investment from a 'Sophisticated Investor'
narrativeHook: Designed to compete with NASDAQ for 'China's new generation of biotech companies' — by 2021 the 18A regime had become Asia's largest biotech fundraising hub.

name: NHSA Established
shortDescription: Single national healthcare payer created
impact: Concentrated bargaining power; enabled VBP at national scale

name: Changsheng Vaccine Scandal
shortDescription: Rabies-vaccine fraud at Changchun Changsheng; ~9.1B RMB in fines
impact: Forced the Vaccine Administration Law and whole-process accountability

name: He Jiankui Embryo-Editing Case
shortDescription: First germline-edited human births announced in Shenzhen
impact: Triggered criminal-law amendments and a national bioethics regime

name: Volume-Based Procurement
shortDescription: 4+7 city pilot, then nationwide expansion
impact: Crushed generic margins; forced industry toward true innovation

name: CFDA Renamed NMPA
shortDescription: Restructured under State Administration for Market Regulation
impact: Signaled completion of the 2015–2018 reform package

name: Vaccine Administration Law
shortDescription: Whole-process responsibility over vaccine R&D, manufacture, distribution
impact: Lifted the bar for Chinese WHO prequalification

name: HGR Regulation Codified
shortDescription: 1998 interim measures elevated to formal State Council regulation
impact: Hardened controls on cross-border samples and joint clinical research

name: STAR Market Launches
shortDescription: Shanghai exchange opens to pre-revenue tech and biotech
impact: Second IPO venue; reduced reliance on HK and US listings

name: Biosecurity Law
shortDescription: Unified biosafety, pathogen control, and bioresource security
impact: Elevated biotechnology to national-security status

name: New Drug Registration Regulation
shortDescription: Comprehensive overhaul codifying the reform decade
impact: Locked in conditional approval, breakthrough designation, real-world evidence

name: Value-Oriented Oncology Guideline
shortDescription: NMPA explicitly discourages me-too oncology drugs
impact: Demanded head-to-head vs standard of care; killed PD-1 me-too rush

name: Human Genetic Resources Tightening
shortDescription: Restrictions on cross-border genetic data and samples
impact: Complicated multinational trials and academic collaborations

name: 14th Five-Year Bioeconomy Plan
shortDescription: First top-level national bioeconomy strategy
impact: Folded medicine, agriculture, biosafety, and manufacturing into one frame

name: BIOSECURE Act Introduced
shortDescription: US bill targeting WuXi AppTec, WuXi Biologics, BGI, MGI, Complete Genomics
impact: Existential threat to China CRO/CDMO revenue from US clients

name: BIOSECURE Enacted
shortDescription: Signed into law as Section 851 of the FY2026 NDAA
impact: Triggered WuXi divestitures and BeiGene → BeOne redomicile to Switzerland

name: State Council 2025 Reform Guideline
shortDescription: Roadmap to make China a pharma powerhouse by 2027 / 2035
impact: Doubles down on innovation despite financing slump and decoupling
